name: get_device_logs
description: Retrieve historical status change logs for a device over a given time range. Returns timestamped entries showing which data points changed and to what values. Useful for auditing device behavior or debugging automation issues.

parameters.name: device_id
parameters.description: The unique ID of the device.

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Start of the time range as a Unix timestamp in milliseconds.

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: End of the time range as a Unix timestamp in milliseconds.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Log type: 1 for command logs, 2 for status report logs, 7 for all.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Number of log entries to return per page. Default 20, max 100.
